channel.title: GitHub HLSL Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of HLSL in GitHub

item.title: Mortalitas/GShade
item.description: GShade is a heavily modified fork of ReShade that features numerous improvements as well as a selectively-unlocked depth buffer for specific online games.

item.title: ColinLeung-NiloCat/UnityURPToonLitShaderExample
item.description: A very simple toon lit shader example, for you to learn writing custom lit shader in Unity URP
